name: vibe2prod core session commands
description: The session-continuity slash commands. Pure commands, no hooks. The optional launcher (bin/) auto-spawns a new terminal tab and is WSL + Windows Terminal + zellij specific — the commands work without it.

bin.note: Only for auto-spawning a fresh tab from /handoff, /handoff-many, /new-session. Needs WSL + Windows Terminal + zellij. Skip it on any other stack — the commands fall back to just printing the handoff path.
